economic_notes: Ozhushk-Onegaming Corporation is the government business enterprise (GBE) accounted for on modified equity basis. 2742164 Ontario Limited o/a The Reef Store by the Lake is a second GBE. Consolidated subsidiaries include Golden Eagle Casino and Charitable Entertainment Centre, Wauzhushk Onigum Foundation, and Kinew Day Care. CMHC 8-unit housing project in progress with $1,521,933 advances received.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) gaming revenue completeness cannot be verified due to lack of dual custody over cash and gaming cards; (2) incomplete inventory of tangible capital assets — the nation has not fully adopted PSAB Section 3150. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Winnipeg, Manitoba'. Two GBEs: Ozhushk-Onegaming Corporation (net loss $242,264 in 2021 vs net income $1,080,855 in 2020) and 2742164 Ontario Limited o/a The Reef Store by the Lake (new in 2021, net loss $13,433). CMHC revenue in statement of operations shows $254,190 but Note 14 shows $615,260 — the $254,190 appears to be net of deferred amount. Total government transfers per Note 14 is $16,379,627. Prior year total government transfers per Note 14 is $20,923,787. OSR calculated as total revenue $20,993,639 minus total government transfers $16,379,627 = $4,613,012. Child care expenses $809,935 not mapped to a standard category.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
